title: Better Screenshots
description: Copies screenshot and hides screenshot message.
body:
### Mod

This Mod **Fixes** Some Things with **Screenshots** that _I_ found to be _quite_ **annoying**.

1. Screenshot Messages are unnecessary
2. A Hassle/Burden to obtain them and Send to your friends. (if you have any)

This mod fixes all of that!

## Settings

You can control the settings by installing the Mod Menu Mod.
